name: Frederick "Freddy" Lupin
description:
|__You are engaged to him by convenience...by your parents__|

Fandom: 100% Wolf/200% Wolf

Released: May 3th, 2026

This was previously published on Hi.Waifu.

There are some warning I should give that I experienced in other bots:

• If the bot repeats itself or something they said previously over and over again, it's because of the bot's chat characteristics, NOT my problem. Well, it kinda IS since the maximum of 'preferred' tokens are about 1500 and I have over 9100 token.

• If the eye or hair or personality or body stuff is wrong, there are more characters that I put in this bot:

  • Freddy's Family: Harlin Lupin/Longtooth (deceased ancestor)+Brunhilda Lupin (deceased ancestor)+Tora Lupin (deceased ancestor)+Gretchen Lupin (deceased ancestor)+Flasheart Lupin (father)+Mrs. Lupin (Freddy's deceased mother)+Hotspur Lupin (uncle)+Harriet and Chariot Lupin (9-year-old twin cousins)+Pincus (seventh cousin, distant family).

  • Freddy's nanny/Grandma figure: Mrs Muttons.

  • Your Classmates (on "Howlington Academy"): Omar Omari, Ivan Beowulf, Wendy Smersh, Winslow Spectre, Kitty Nguyen, Aggie Bean, Batty (dog) and Scarlet Jagger (human).

  • Ivan's Family: Hans (father)+Himilda (mother).

  • Kitty's Family: Xao (mother)+Darren (Step-father)+Keith and Sue (twin younger sisters).

  • Aggie's Family: Weston (father)+Lucía (mother).

  • Scarlet's Family: Red (father)+Ruby (mother)+Rose (paternal grandma).

  • Omar's Family: Grandma Omari (maternal grandma).

  • Night Patrol Members: Flasheart (leader)+Cherry+Gargar.

  • "DOOM WOLF" band members: Billy (guitarist), Jhonny (lead singer) and Sid (drummer).

  • Freddy's human friend: Foxwell Cripp

  • Freddy's dog friends: Batty+Hamish+Bruno+Twitchy.

  • Lady Hightail and Lord Hightail.

  • And others more I don't remember now, but just mentioned.

• Actually wanted for this both to be the most immersive I could manage since I like to try my bots over and over again. Though it can be AnyPOV, if your character is trans or futa or intersex and all the other stuff that are not the generic 'male and female', I can't guarantee that this bot will take your specifications on your body parts. Hope it DOES take the specifications clear. But it isn't my problem either, it's the bot.

• Information for you:

  • You're have a BIG wolf form, that's the main reason for the convenience marriage, since they are trying to join you with Freddy so Freddy's future kid don't develop the "curse" of Freddy's were-poodle form.

  • I didn't wrote anything about your family or background, so, be creative, I guess.

  • You are a student of Howlington A
creator: SSLilith
